name: 马夏尔·查纳·巴查门
name_full: 马夏尔·查纳·巴查门 Martial Tchana Batchamen

last_movies.title: 海贼王(真人版) 第二季

introduction: Martial Batchamen Tchana is a Film and Television Actor, known for Lootere (2024), Tali's Joburg Diaries (2022-23), Redeeming Love (2022). He was introduced into the film and television industry shortly after his arrival in South Africa at the age of 8, and made his first appearance in an international series named Charlie Jade (2005). Born in Yaoundé, Cameroon, he is fluent in both French and English. A lover of Life and all things Art.
